feed.title: Cognitive Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Cognitive Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Little agents of big language change
entry.summary: Authors: Sergei Monakhov DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2025-0112 Pages: Page range: 167-199

entry.title: Detecting patterns of change in the development of the Mandarin dative alternation: from attraction to differentiation and the reversal
entry.summary: Authors: Meili Liu, Yi Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2024-0126 Pages: Page range: 201-240

entry.title: A corpus-based study: how palm-up finds its way into Chinese Sign Language
entry.summary: Authors: Yuting Zhang, Hao Lin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2023-0150 Pages: Page range: 241-275

entry.title: The effects of corpus model predictors on L2 constructional use: the case ofletandpermit
entry.summary: Authors: Sarut Supasiraprapa, Sakol Suethanapornkul DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2025-0009 Pages: Page range: 277-312

entry.title: Shades of entrenchment and conventionalization: the rise ofmarronin French
entry.summary: Authors: Philippe Gréa, Guillaume Desagulier, Quentin Feltgen, Florence Villoing, Sabine Lehmann DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2025-0076 Pages: Page range: 313-352
